Title: Maximum Two
Problem_Statement: Read two integers and print maximum.

Title: Sign Number
Problem_Statement: Read n and print Positive Negative or Zero.

Title: Sum N
Problem_Statement: Read n and print sum 1 to n using loop.

Title: Count Digits
Problem_Statement: Read non-negative n and print digit count.

Title: Multiplication Ten
Problem_Statement: Read n and print n*10.

Title: Minimum Two
Problem_Statement: Read two integers and print minimum.

Title: Voting Eligibility
Problem_Statement: Read age and print Eligible if >= 18 else Not Eligible.

Title: Vowel or Consonant
Problem_Statement: Read lowercase char c and print Vowel if a,e,i,o,u else Consonant.

Title: Pass or Fail
Problem_Statement: Read marks out of 100 and print Pass if >= 40 else Fail.

Title: Print N to 1
Problem_Statement: Read n and print numbers from n down to 1 space separated.

Title: Leap Year
Problem_Statement: Read year and print Leap or Not Leap.

Title: Factorial
Problem_Statement: Read n (0 to 12) and print factorial.

Title: Reverse Number
Problem_Statement: Read non-negative integer and print reverse.

Title: Prime Check
Problem_Statement: Read positive integer n and print Prime or Not Prime.

Title: Fibonacci
Problem_Statement: Read n and print nth Fibonacci (0th=0, 1st=1).

Title: Sum of Even up to N
Problem_Statement: Read n and print sum of all even integers from 1 to n.

Title: Palindrome Number Check
Problem_Statement: Read non-negative n and print Palindrome or Not Palindrome.

Title: Factors Count
Problem_Statement: Read positive integer n and print number of divisors of n.

Title: Count Even Digits
Problem_Statement: Read non-negative n and print count of even digits.

Title: Sum of Odd Digits
Problem_Statement: Read non-negative n and print sum of odd digits.

Title: Prime Range Print
Problem_Statement:
Write a C program to print the prime numbers in a given range.
Read start and end (inclusive). Print all prime numbers in range space separated. If none, print empty line or nothing.

Title: Armstrong Check
Problem_Statement: Read n and print Armstrong or Not Armstrong (sum of cubes of digits == n for 3-digit numbers).

Title: Perfect Number
Problem_Statement: Read n and print Perfect or Not Perfect (sum of proper divisors == n).

Title: Pattern Count
Problem_Statement: Read n and print number of stars in n-row triangle n*(n+1)/2.

Title: Collatz Steps
Problem_Statement: Read n and print steps to reach 1 by Collatz rule (if even n/2 else 3*n+1).

Title: Strong Number Check
Problem_Statement: Read n and print Strong or Not Strong (sum of factorials of digits == n).
